metaDescription: Gemma 3 (Google), released 2025-03-12 — part of the Gemma (open weights) line. 1B/4B/12B/27B sizes; multimodal (image), 128K context, 140+ languages; a 270M si…
overview: Gemma 3 is a large language model from Google, part of the Gemma (open weights) line. Released 2025-03-12. Google's family of open-weight models derived from Gemini research, for local and commercial use.
What's notable in this version: 1B/4B/12B/27B sizes; multimodal (image), 128K context, 140+ languages; a 270M size added Aug 2025.
